.config [dir]
.config/base [dir]
.config/base/basefile -> <REPO>/remotes/upstream/base/common/basefile
.config/easyrice [dir]
.config/easyrice/logs [dir]
.config/easyrice/logs/easyrice.log [file]
.config/easyrice/repos [dir]
.config/easyrice/repos/default [dir]
.config/easyrice/repos/default/rice.toml [file]
